WITH cust_year AS (
    SELECT
        y.CustomerID,
        CAST(SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) AS INTEGER) AS year,
        SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN customers c ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) IN ('2012', '2013')
    GROUP BY y.CustomerID, CAST(SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) AS INTEGER)
),
cust_2012_2013 AS (
    SELECT
        cy2012.CustomerID,
        cy2012.total_consumption AS cons2012,
        cy2013.total_consumption AS cons2013
    FROM cust_year cy2012
    JOIN cust_year cy2013
      ON cy2012.CustomerID = cy2013.CustomerID
     AND cy2012.year = 2012
     AND cy2013.year = 2013
),
segment_agg AS (
    SELECT
        c.Segment,
        SUM(c213.cons2012) AS seg_cons2012,
        SUM(c213.cons2013) AS seg_cons2013
    FROM cust_2012_2013 c213
    JOIN customers c ON c.CustomerID = c213.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
    GROUP BY c.Segment
),
segment_pct AS (
    SELECT
        Segment,
        seg_cons2012,
        seg_cons2013,
        (seg_cons2013 - seg_cons2012) AS abs_increase,
        CASE
            WHEN seg_cons2013 = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE (seg_cons2013 - seg_cons2012) * 100.0 / seg_cons2013
        END AS pct_increase
    FROM segment_agg
),
ranked AS (
    SELECT
        Segment,
        seg_cons2012,
        seg_cons2013,
        abs_increase,
        pct_increase,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY pct_increase DESC) AS rank_desc,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY pct_increase ASC) AS rank_asc
    FROM segment_pct
)
SELECT
    Segment,
    seg_cons2012,
    seg_cons2013,
    abs_increase,
    pct_increase,
    CASE WHEN rank_desc = 1 THEN 'Highest percentage increase' END AS highest_flag,
    CASE WHEN rank_asc = 1 THEN 'Lowest percentage increase' END AS lowest_flag
FROM ranked
ORDER BY pct_increase DESC;
1481:
WITH yearly_consumption AS (
    SELECT
        c.CustomerID,
        c.Segment,
        c.Currency,
        SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption_2013
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
      AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
    GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment, c.Currency
),
segment_min AS (
    SELECT
        Segment,
        MIN(total_consumption_2013) AS min_consumption
    FROM yearly_consumption
    GROUP BY Segment
),
segment_min_customers AS (
    SELECT
        yc.Segment,
        yc.CustomerID,
        yc.total_consumption_2013
    FROM yearly_consumption yc
    JOIN segment_min sm
      ON yc.Segment = sm.Segment
     AND yc.total_consumption_2013 = sm.min_consumption
),
segment_annual_avg AS (
    SELECT
        Segment,
        SUM(total_consumption_2013) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS annual_avg_min_consumption
    FROM segment_min_customers
    GROUP BY Segment
),
pivot AS (
    SELECT
        MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'SME' THEN annual_avg_min_consumption END) AS SME_avg,
        MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'LAM' THEN annual_avg_min_consumption END) AS LAM_avg,
        MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'KAM' THEN annual_avg_min_consumption END) AS KAM_avg
    FROM segment_annual_avg
)
SELECT
    SME_avg - LAM_avg AS diff_SME_minus_LAM,
    LAM_avg - KAM_avg AS diff_LAM_minus_KAM,
    KAM_avg - SME_avg AS diff_KAM_minus_SME
FROM pivot;

    - COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN has_high = 1 THEN ID END) AS diff_low_minus_high

    ID,
    MAX(CASE WHEN PLT < 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_low,

WITH extremes AS (
    SELECT p.id,
           p.player_api_id,
           p.player_name,
           p.height
    FROM Player p
    WHERE p.height = (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player)
       OR p.height = (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player)
),
extreme_avg_finishing AS (
    SELECT e.player_id,
           e.player_name,
           e.height,
           AVG(pa.finishing) AS avg_finishing
    FROM (
        SELECT id AS player_id, player_api_id, player_name, height
        FROM extremes
    ) e
    JOIN Player_Attributes pa
      ON pa.player_api_id = e.player_api_id
    GROUP BY e.player_id, e.player_name, e.height
),
ranked AS (
    SELECT *,
           RANK() OVER (ORDER BY avg_finishing DESC) AS rnk
    FROM extreme_avg_finishing
)
SELECT player_name,
       height,
       avg_finishing
FROM ranked
WHERE rnk = 1;

            MAX(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk' THEN pa.overall_rating END) -
            MAX(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Paulin Puel' THEN pa.overall_rating END)

    ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id

        player_api_id,
        MAX(date) AS max_date
    FROM Player_Attributes

WITH champion_times AS (
    SELECT
        r.year,
        r.raceId,
        /* Convert 'HH:MM:SS.mmm' to total seconds as REAL */
        (
            CAST(substr(res.time, 1, 2) AS INTEGER) * 3600
          + CAST(substr(res.time, 4, 2) AS INTEGER) * 60
          + CAST(substr(res.time, 7, 2) AS INTEGER)
          + CAST(substr(res.time, 10, 3) AS REAL) / 1000.0
        ) AS champion_seconds
    FROM races r
    JOIN results res
        ON r.raceId = res.raceId
    WHERE
        r.year < 1975
        AND res.position = 1         -- champion (race winner)
        AND res.time IS NOT NULL     -- finished races only
)
SELECT
    year,
    AVG(champion_seconds) AS avg_champion_time_seconds
FROM champion_times
GROUP BY year
ORDER BY year;

WITH target_race AS (
    SELECT raceId
    FROM races
    WHERE year = 2008
      AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
),
finishers AS (
    SELECT r.*
    FROM results r
    JOIN target_race tr ON r.raceId = tr.raceId
    WHERE r.time IS NOT NULL
),
champion AS (
    SELECT
        -- parse HH:MM:SS.mmm into milliseconds
        (
            (
                (CAST(SUBSTR(time, 1, 2) AS INTEGER) * 3600) +
                (CAST(SUBSTR(time, 4, 2) AS INTEGER) * 60) +
                CAST(SUBSTR(time, 7, 2) AS INTEGER)
            ) * 1000 +
            CAST(SUBSTR(time, 10, 3) AS INTEGER)
        ) AS champion_ms
    FROM finishers
    WHERE positionOrder = (SELECT MIN(positionOrder) FROM finishers)
),
last_finisher AS (
    SELECT
        -- parse +S.mmm or +SS.mmm as incremental time
        (
            CAST(
                SUBSTR(
                    time,
                    2,
                    INSTR(time, '.') - 2
                ) AS INTEGER
            ) * 1000
            +
            CAST(
                SUBSTR(
                    time,
                    INSTR(time, '.') + 1
                ) AS INTEGER
            )
        ) AS inc_ms
    FROM finishers
    WHERE positionOrder = (SELECT MAX(positionOrder) FROM finishers)
),
times AS (
    SELECT
        c.champion_ms,
        l.inc_ms,
        (c.champion_ms + l.inc_ms) AS last_driver_ms
    FROM champion c
    CROSS JOIN last_finisher l
)
SELECT
    (CAST(inc_ms AS REAL) / last_driver_ms) * 100 AS champion_faster_percentage
FROM times;

WITH youngest_driver AS (

           d.forename,
           d.surname,

),
driver_first_race AS (
    SELECT
        yd.driverId,
        r.name AS race_name,
        r.year,
        r.date,
        r.round,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY yd.driverId
            ORDER BY r.date ASC, r.round ASC
        ) AS rn
    FROM youngest_driver yd
    JOIN results res
        ON res.driverId = yd.driverId
    JOIN races r
        ON r.raceId = res.raceId
)
SELECT
    yd.forename || ' ' || yd.surname AS full_name,
    yd.nationality,
    dfr.race_name AS first_race_name
FROM youngest_driver yd
JOIN driver_first_race dfr
    ON dfr.driverId = yd.driverId
WHERE dfr.rn = 1;

SELECT
    c.name            AS circuit_name,
    c.location        AS circuit_location,
    c.country,
    r.year            AS season_year,
    r.name            AS grand_prix_name,
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS driver_name,
    lt.lap,
    lt.time           AS lap_record_time,
    lt.milliseconds   AS lap_record_milliseconds
FROM (
    SELECT
        lt.*,
        r.circuitId,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY r.circuitId
            ORDER BY lt.milliseconds ASC
        ) AS rn
    FROM lapTimes lt
    JOIN races r ON r.raceId = lt.raceId
    JOIN circuits c ON c.circuitId = r.circuitId
    WHERE c.country = 'Italy'
) lt
JOIN races r     ON r.raceId = lt.raceId
JOIN circuits c  ON c.circuitId = lt.circuitId
JOIN drivers d   ON d.driverId = lt.driverId
WHERE lt.rn = 1
ORDER BY c.name;

WITH youngest_clients AS (

        c.district_id,
        c.birth_date
    FROM client c

),
youngest_with_salary AS (
    SELECT
        yc.client_id,
        yc.birth_date,
        d.district_id,
        d.A11 AS avg_salary
    FROM youngest_clients yc
    JOIN district d ON yc.district_id = d.district_id
),
max_salary_among_youngest AS (
    SELECT MAX(avg_salary) AS max_avg_salary
    FROM youngest_with_salary

        FROM loan AS l2

WITH female_clients AS (
    SELECT
        c.client_id,
        c.birth_date,
        d.A11 AS avg_salary,
        a.account_id
    FROM client c
    JOIN district d
        ON c.district_id = d.district_id
    JOIN disp di
        ON c.client_id = di.client_id
    JOIN account a
        ON di.account_id = a.account_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
),
oldest_birth AS (
    SELECT MIN(birth_date) AS min_birth_date
    FROM female_clients
),
oldest_females AS (
    SELECT fc.*
    FROM female_clients fc
    JOIN oldest_birth ob
        ON fc.birth_date = ob.min_birth_date
),
oldest_min_salary AS (
    SELECT MIN(avg_salary) AS min_avg_salary
    FROM oldest_females
),
salary_gap AS (
    SELECT
        MAX(avg_salary) AS highest_avg_salary,
        MIN(avg_salary) AS lowest_avg_salary,
        MAX(avg_salary) - MIN(avg_salary) AS salary_gap
    FROM female_clients
)
SELECT
    ofe.account_id,
    sg.salary_gap
FROM oldest_females ofe
JOIN oldest_min_salary oms
    ON ofe.avg_salary = oms.min_avg_salary
CROSS JOIN salary_gap sg;

WITH first_loan AS (
    SELECT l.loan_id,
           l.account_id,
           d.client_id
    FROM loan l
    JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
    JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
    WHERE l.date = DATE '1993-07-05'
      AND d.type = 'OWNER'
    ORDER BY l.date, l.loan_id
    LIMIT 1
),
bal_1993 AS (
    SELECT t.account_id,
           t.balance AS balance_1993
    FROM trans t
    JOIN first_loan fl ON t.account_id = fl.account_id
    WHERE t.date = DATE '1993-03-22'
    ORDER BY t.trans_id DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
bal_1998 AS (
    SELECT t.account_id,
           t.balance AS balance_1998
    FROM trans t
    JOIN first_loan fl ON t.account_id = fl.account_id
    WHERE t.date = DATE '1998-12-27'
    ORDER BY t.trans_id DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT fl.client_id,
       fl.account_id,
       b93.balance_1993,
       b98.balance_1998,
       ((b98.balance_1998 - b93.balance_1993) * 1.0 / b93.balance_1993) * 100 AS increase_rate_percent
FROM first_loan fl
JOIN bal_1993 b93 ON fl.account_id = b93.account_id
JOIN bal_1998 b98 ON fl.account_id = b98.account_id;

WITH loan_totals AS (
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1996' THEN 1996
            WHEN strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1997' THEN 1997
        END AS loan_year,
        SUM(l.amount) AS total_amount
    FROM loan l
    JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
    JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
    JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'M'
      AND strftime('%Y', l.date) IN ('1996', '1997')
    GROUP BY loan_year
),
pivoted AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN loan_year = 1996 THEN total_amount END) AS amount_1996,
        SUM(CASE WHEN loan_year = 1997 THEN total_amount END) AS amount_1997
    FROM loan_totals
)
SELECT
    amount_1996,
    amount_1997,
    CASE
        WHEN amount_1996 IS NULL OR amount_1996 = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE (amount_1997 - amount_1996) * 100.0 / amount_1996
    END AS growth_rate_percent
FROM pivoted;
